ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or continent where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country's geographical center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country's geographical center */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the country's data was last updated */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes in the country's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blood_type_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "o_pos" REAL /* Percentage of O+ blood type */,
  "a_pos" REAL /* Percentage of A+ blood type */,
  "b_pos" REAL /* Percentage of B+ blood type */,
  "ab_pos" REAL /* Percentage of AB+ blood type */,
  "o_neg" REAL /* Percentage of O- blood type */,
  "a_neg" REAL /* Percentage of A- blood type */,
  "b_neg" REAL /* Percentage of B- blood type */,
  "ab_neg" REAL /* Percentage of AB- blood type */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the distribution data is recorded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the distribution data was last updated */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes in the distribution data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blood_type_distribution_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region's geographical center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region's geographical center */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the region's data was last updated */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes in the region's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blood_types" (
  "blood_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blood type */,
  "blood_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the blood type (e.g., O+, A+, B+) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the blood type */,
  "rhesus_factor" TEXT /* Whether the blood type is Rh-positive or Rh-negative */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the blood type data was last updated */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes in the blood type data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blood_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blood_type_prevalence" (
  "prevalence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prevalence record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "blood_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the blood type */,
  "prevalence_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population with this blood type */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the prevalence data is recorded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the prevalence data was last updated */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes in the prevalence data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prevalence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blood_type_prevalence_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blood_type_prevalence_blood_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("blood_type_id") REFERENCES blood_types ("blood_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., 0-14, 15-64, 65+) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Number of people in the age group and gender */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the demographic data is recorded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the demographic data was last updated */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes in the demographic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_demographics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blood_donation_records" (
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donation record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the donor */,
  "donation_date" TEXT /* Date of the donation */,
  "blood_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the blood type */,
  "donation_volume" REAL /* Volume of blood donated in milliliters */,
  "donation_center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the donation center */,
  "donation_status" TEXT /* Status of the donation (e.g., completed, canceled) */,
  "donation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the donation (e.g., emergency, routine) */,
  "donation_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments related to the donation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the donation record was last updated */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes in the donation record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blood_donation_records_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blood_donation_records_blood_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("blood_type_id") REFERENCES blood_types ("blood_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blood_donation_records_donation_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("donation_center_id") REFERENCES donation_centers ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blood_donation_records_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donors" (
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donor */,
  "donor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the donor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the donor */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the donor */,
  "blood_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the blood type */,
  "donation_count" INTEGER /* Total number of donations by the donor */,
  "last_donation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last donation */,
  "blood_group" TEXT /* ABO blood group (e.g., O, A, B, AB) */,
  "rhesus_factor" TEXT /* Whether the donor's blood type is Rh-positive or Rh-negative */,
  "donation_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of donations (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "last_donation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the last donation */,
  "donation_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments related to the donor */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the donor's data was last updated */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes in the donor's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donors_blood_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("blood_type_id") REFERENCES blood_types ("blood_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donation_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donation center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the donation center */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the donation center */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the center */,
  "operational_hours" TEXT /* Operational hours of the center */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the donation center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the donation center */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of donors the center can handle at a time */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact number for the center */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the center's data was last updated */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes in the center's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donation_centers_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blood_bank_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the donation center */,
  "blood_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the blood type */,
  "total_units" INTEGER /* Total number of units of the blood type in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the blood units in stock */,
  "blood_group" TEXT /* ABO blood group (e.g., O, A, B, AB) */,
  "rhesus_factor" TEXT /* Whether the blood type is Rh-positive or Rh-negative */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes in the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blood_bank_inventory_blood_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("blood_type_id") REFERENCES blood_types ("blood_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blood_bank_inventory_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES donation_centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the health indicator (e.g., Life expectancy, Infant mortality rate) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the health indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the health indicator data */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of health indicator (e.g., demographic, medical) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the health indicator data was last updated */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes in the health indicator data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic group (e.g., Ethnicity, Religion) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic group */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the demographic group data was last updated */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes in the demographic group data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blood_type_distribution_by_group" (
  "distribution_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution by group record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic group */,
  "blood_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the blood type */,
  "prevalence_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the group with this blood type */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the distribution by group data is recorded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the distribution by group data was last updated */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes in the distribution by group data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blood_type_distribution_by_group_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES demographic_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blood_type_distribution_by_group_blood_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("blood_type_id") REFERENCES blood_types ("blood_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blood_type_distribution_by_group_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, healthcare professional, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the user's data was last updated */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes in the user's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
